_doc: GIIIFT marketplace pricing — THE single source of truth (spec §14.5). Client engine fetches it (embedded zeros as fallback) and the /api/market/* edge functions read the same file, so changing a number here updates quotes across the whole system. All zeros until the owner sets the PRICING.md schedule.
_units: percentages are 0-100; usd amounts are dollars; creditPerUsd is how many credits one dollar buys when credit-priced goods show a $ equivalent
_onramp: M4 rails config — provider order is Coinbase-first per docs/UNIT_ECONOMICS.md (zero-fee USDC vs MoonPay's $3.99 floor); bank methods ride INSIDE the providers' widgets (ACH/SEPA). Owner reorders/trims here, no code change.
